content.content:
1→import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority"
     2→import type * as React from "react"
     3→
     4→import { cn } from "@/utils/cn"
     5→
     6→const badgeVariants = cva(
     7→	"inline-flex items-center border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 rounded",
     8→	{
     9→		variants: {
    10→			variant: {
    11→				default:
    12→					"border-transparent bg-black dark:bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/80",
    13→				secondary:
    14→					"border-transparent bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80",
    15→				destructive:
    16→					"border-transparent bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/80",
    17→				outline: "text-foreground",
    18→				rx: "border-transparent bg-green-100 text-green-800 dark:bg-green-900 dark:text-green-100",
    19→				"rx+":
    20→					"border-transparent bg-red-100 text-red-800 dark:bg-red-900 dark:text-red-100",
    21→				scaled:
    22→					"border-transparent bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800 dark:bg-yellow-900 dark:text-yellow-100",
    23→			},
    24→			clickable: {
    25→				true: "",
    26→				false: "",
    27→			},
    28→		},
    29→		compoundVariants: [
    30→			{
    31→				variant: "default",
    32→				clickable: true,
    33→				className:
    34→					"hover:bg-primary/80 hover:dark:text-secondary-foreground dark:text-muted-foreground",
    35→			},
    36→			{
    37→				variant: "secondary",
    38→				clickable: true,
    39→				className:
    40→					"hover:bg-border dark:hover:bg-secondary hover:dark:text-secondary-foreground dark:text-muted-foreground",
    41→			},
    42→			{
    43→				variant: "destructive",
    44→				clickable: true,
    45→				className:
    46→					"hover:bg-destructive/80 hover:dark:text-secondary-foreground dark:text-muted-foreground",
    47→			},
    48→			{
    49→				variant: "rx",
    50→				clickable: true,
    51→				className:
    52→					"hover:bg-green-200 dark:hover:bg-green-800 hover:dark:text-secondary-foreground dark:text-muted-foreground",
    53→			},
    54→			{
    55→				variant: "rx+",
    56→				clickable: true,
    57→				className:
    58→					"hover:bg-red-200 dark:hover:bg-red-800 hover:dark:text-secondary-foreground dark:text-muted-foreground",
    59→			},
    60→			{
    61→				variant: "scaled",
    62→				clickable: true,
    63→				className:
    64→					"hover:bg-yellow-200 dark:hover:bg-yellow-800 hover:dark:text-secondary-foreground dark:text-muted-foreground",
    65→			},
    66→		],
    67→		defaultVariants: {
    68→			variant: "default",
    69→		},
    70→	},
    71→)
    72→
    73→export interface BadgeProps
    74→	extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>,
    75→		VariantProps<typeof badgeVariants> {}
    76→
    77→function Badge({ className, variant, clickable, ...props }: BadgeProps) {
    78→	return (
    79→		<div
    80→			className={cn(badgeVariants({ variant, clickable }), className)}
    81→			{...props}
    82→		/>
    83→	)
    84→}
    85→
    86→export { Badge, badgeVariants }
    87→

content.text: The default variant applies `bg-black dark:bg-primary text-primary-foreground` — that `text-primary-foreground` (white) is likely winning over `text-orange-700` due to CSS specificity. Need to pass `variant="outline"` or `variant={null}` so the default styles don't fight.
